overall.description: Gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game showing a character walking through a futuristic city at night. The scene transitions from a covered digital advertising corridor to an open waterfront promenade lined with neon-lit skyscrapers and holographic billboards.

agents.ego_description: moving steadily through a covered walkway lined with large illuminated digital billboards in first-person perspective

notable_agents.action: standing near the ALL FOODS billboard looking at the advertisement

entered.detail: large illuminated yellow billboard with red text and cartoon mascot
large illuminated billboard showing motorcycle advertisement with pink lighting
dark metal ceiling structure covering the walkway
futuristic vending machine with glowing interface

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person perspective walking through a covered urban corridor with polished concrete floors. Large digital billboards line both walls - a yellow ALL FOODS advertisement on the left and a motorcycle ad on the right. The space is dimly lit primarily by the glow of the advertisements, with a few pedestrians standing near the walls.

events.description: camera perspective switches to third-person view following a character in a red vest
approaching the exit of the covered corridor into the open plaza area

agents.ego_description: following closely behind a character wearing a red vest with 'BURN CORP SHIT' text printed on the back

notable_agents.action: walking forward toward the corridor exit wearing a distinctive red vest with white text

entered.detail: opening at the end of the corridor revealing the outdoor plaza beyond

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to third-person following a character in a red 'BURN CORP SHIT' vest through the remaining length of the covered corridor. The character walks toward a bright exit ahead where an open plaza is visible. The ALL FOODS billboard falls behind as the camera moves forward, while the motorcycle billboard recedes into the distance on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with canal and amphitheater stairs

events.description: exits covered corridor into open waterfront promenade with canal on left and stairs on right
character passes by seated pedestrians on benches along the waterfront

agents.ego_description: following the character along the wet concrete promenade, passing other pedestrians and benches

notable_agents.action: walking down the stairs on the right side of the promenade

entered.detail: dark water canal reflecting the city lights, bordered by a metal railing
wide set of concrete stairs ascending along the right side of the walkway
tall palm tree in a circular concrete planter
tall cyberpunk-style buildings with illuminated windows and neon signage
floating digital advertisements on the buildings across the canal
modern concrete seating along the waterfront with people sitting

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the corridor onto a wide waterfront promenade with a canal on the left and steep concrete stairs on the right. The ground is wet and reflective, suggesting recent rain. Tall futuristic skyscrapers with neon lights and holographic billboards rise in the background. The character continues walking along the promenade, passing benches where other pedestrians sit, while more people walk up and down the stairs. The camera follows steadily as they approach a massive building structure with a distinctive gate-like opening in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous movement from a claustrophobic, advertisement-lined corridor into a vast, neon-lit futuristic waterfront. It begins in a first-person perspective walking across polished concrete floors, flanked by glowing digital billboards for food and motorcycles in a dimly lit urban passage. As the camera shifts to a third-person view, it follows a character in a red vest moving toward a bright exit while the corridor's advertisements recede into the background. The scene then opens wide as the character emerges onto a reflective, rain-slicked promenade bordered by a canal and steep concrete stairs. Finally, the camera tracks the character past seated pedestrians and towering skyscrapers toward a massive building with a distinctive gate-like opening under the glow of holographic billboards.
